title: psorospermum orientale
intro: Psorospermum orientale, also known as the neem tree or Azadirachta indica, is a plant native to the Indian subcontinent that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of the neem tree include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Psorospermum orientale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. Herbal preparations of the neem tree include teas, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including acne, eczema, and ulcers.
